name: Potato Salad with Haricots Verts, Roquefort and Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
To make potato salad:
Preheat oven to 450°F. Mix potatoes and 8 tablespoons vinaigrette in a large baking dish. Roast for 20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F and continue roasting until potatoes are tender, stirring occasionally, about 50 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl and cool slightly. Mix in 8 tablespoons vinaigrette and 2/3 cup crumbled roquefort cheese. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Cook haricots verts in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Drain. Rinse under cold water to cool; drain well. Transfer to a medium bowl. Mix in 8 tablespoons vinaigrette and walnuts. Season with salt and pepper.
Arrange beans on platter. Mound potatoes in the center of platter atop beans. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
